name: Creamy Maderia Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or Green Bell Pepper, chopped
1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, condensed, reduced-fat
recipeInstructions:
1. If the chicken is frozen, microwave it for 3 minutes, uncovered on high, to defrost slightly.
2. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet, heat the oil on medium. Peel and coarsely chop the onion, adding it to the pan as you chop. Raise the heat to medium-high.
3. Add the mushrooms and stir occasionally. Cut the chicken into bite-sized chunks.
4. When all of the chicken is cut, add it to the pan and raise the heat to high. Add the Maderia wine.
5. Seed and finely chop the green pepper and add it to the skillet. Cook the chicken for about 3 to 4 more minutes or until no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
6. Meanwhile, stir in the Worcestershire sauce, chicken bouillon (if desired), and black pepper.
7. Lower the heat to medium and add the soup, stirring thoroughly.
8. Add the milk and continue to stir until well-mixed. Reduce the heat to simmer.
9. Sprinkle the cheese over the skillet, and stir to mix and melt the cheese.
10. Toast the bread while serving. Spoon a generous amount of the chicken mixture over each bread slice. Serve immediately.
Serves 4
